Shirakawa-gō Ogimachi.notes: Hours: Village 24h, individual gasshō houses generally 09:00–16:00 (small fee ~¥300–400 each). Free to walk village. Winter light-ups require reservation.

parking.name: Seseragi Park Parking (せせらぎ公園駐車場)
parking.notes: Main visitor lot across Shōkawa River; reach village by footbridge (~5 min walk).

Shirakawa-gō Ogimachi.getting_there: Nōhi Bus from Takayama (~50 min, ¥2600) or Kanazawa (~75 min, ¥2000) to Shirakawa-gō bus terminal.

Shiratani Unsuikyō.notes: Hours: 08:30–16:30 (last entry; trails year-round). ¥500 forest-conservation fee per adult, payable at trail entrance gate. Yakushima Recreational Forest.

parking.name: Shiratani Unsuikyō Parking
parking.notes: Narrow mountain road from Miyanoura; limited spaces, arrive early.

Shiratani Unsuikyō.getting_there: From Miyanoura Port (Yakushima): Tanegashima-Yakushima Kotsu bus ~35 min, or rental car ~30 min via mountain road.

Shiretoko Five Lakes (Shiretoko Goko).notes: Ground-path guided tour ¥3,500 in bear-activity season (May 10–Jul 31); ¥250 lecture fee in vegetation-protection season; elevated boardwalk free. Hours ~07:30–18:30 seasonal. Closed in winter.
Shiretoko Five Lakes (Shiretoko Goko).getting_there: From Utoro ~25 min by car via Route 334/Shiretoko Park Line; limited bus service in summer.

Shiretoko National Park.notes: Hours: Park 24h; Nature Center 08:00–17:30 (Apr–Oct), shorter winter. Free to enter. Shiretoko Five Lakes elevated walkway free; ground trail requires guided tour & permit (bear season).

parking.name: Shiretoko Five Lakes Parking
parking.notes: Main trailhead lot; Kamuiwakka access by shuttle bus only in peak summer.

Shiretoko National Park.getting_there: From Shari Stn: Shari Bus to Utoro Onsen (~50 min), then Shiretoko Five Lakes route bus or car. Memanbetsu Airport ~2 hr drive.

Shuri Castle (Shurijō).notes: Hours: Paid zone 08:30–19:00 (Apr–Jun, Oct–Nov), 08:30–20:00 (Jul–Sep), 08:30–18:00 (Dec–Mar). Main hall (Seiden) still under reconstruction after 2019 fire; Hōshinmon, Yohoden & Higashi-no-Azana viewing zone open.

parking.name: Shurijō Park Prefectural Parking (Suimuikan)
parking.notes: Underground lot at Suimuikan visitor center.

Shuri Castle (Shurijō).getting_there: Yui Rail to Shuri Stn, 15-min walk; or Naha Bus 7/8 to Shurijō-mae.

parking.name: Parcheggio Sirmione Centro / P+R (Via Colombare area)
parking.notes: Multiple parking zones at the peninsula entrance, outside the ZTL: P1 (Via Brescia — closest, highest cost), P2 (Via Colombare — main paid lot), free lots further out. ZTL cameras control access to the historic centre.

entrance.name: Scaligero Castle gate / ZTL boundary (old town entrance)
entrance.transfer: Walk 5–10 min from P+R through the castle gate into the car-free peninsula

Sirmione.getting_there: Drive to Sirmione and park on Via Colombare / Via Brescia (outside the ZTL). The historic peninsula is car-free; walk 5–10 min through the castle gate.

parking.name: Parcheggio Pontal d'Entrèves (Skyway base station)
parking.notes: Parking adjacent to the cable-car base in Pontal d'Entrèves (Courmayeur, Aosta Valley). Cabins rotate 360°; 80 passengers/cabin; base 1,300 m → Pavillon 2,173 m → Pointe Helbronner 3,466 m.

entrance.name: Skyway Monte Bianco base station, Pontal d'Entrèves (1,300 m)
entrance.transfer: Cable car: ~6 min to Pavillon (2,173 m); +7 min to Pointe Helbronner (3,466 m)

Skyway Monte Bianco.getting_there: Drive to Pontal d'Entrèves near Courmayeur (Aosta Valley); park at the cable-car base; take Skyway up to Pavillon (2,173 m) or onward to Pointe Helbronner (3,466 m).

St. Moritz.notes: Village free; lifts, spa and Engadine museum extra.

St. Peter's Island (Petersinsel).notes: Island walking is free; reached only by boat (~CHF 30 return from Erlach).

Stanserhorn.notes: Stans–Stanserhorn funicular + open-top CabriO cable car return.

parking.name: Talstation Mutterberg — Stubaier Gletscherbahn
parking.notes: Valley station at ~1,750 m at the top of Stubaital, ~35 km south of Innsbruck. Large open-air parking at Mutterberg. Paid parking; exact rate not publicly listed. Road dead-ends here. Stubaiexpress bus from Innsbruck/Neustift also serves the valley station.

entrance.name: Stubaier Gletscherbahn valley station (Talstation Mutterberg, ~1,750 m)
entrance.transfer: Multi-stage gondola from Mutterberg to the glacier (3,210 m); ~20–25 min total. Panorama platform at summit.

Stubaier Gletscher (3210 m).getting_there: Drive up Stubaital (B183) to road-end at Mutterberg (~1,750 m), 35 km south of Innsbruck. Park at Stubaier Gletscherbahn valley station (paid, ~€6/day est.). Cable car to 3,210 m. Stubaiexpress bus from Innsbruck also serves.

Swiss National Park.notes: Park entry and trails free; visitor centre in Zernez free.

Takachiho Gorge (Manai-no-Taki).notes: Gorge walk free; rowboat rental ¥4,100/30min weekdays, ¥5,100 weekends (reservation recommended). Boats 08:30–17:00.
Takachiho Gorge (Manai-no-Taki).getting_there: From Nobeoka ~1h15 via Route 218; no train (Takachiho Line discontinued).

Takatō Castle Ruins Park.notes: Free outside sakura season; ¥500 during cherry-blossom festival (early–mid April), 06:00–22:00 with night illumination.
Takatō Castle Ruins Park.getting_there: JR Ina-shi Station + bus 25 min; by car ~30 min from Ina IC (Chuo Expressway).

Takayama Sannomachi Old Town.notes: Historic preservation district free to walk; individual sake breweries/museums charge. Shops typically 09:00–17:00.

parking.name: Sannomachi Parking
parking.notes: Max ~¥1,500/day

Takayama Sannomachi Old Town.getting_there: JR Takayama Station 10–12 min walk east across Miyagawa.

Takeda Castle Ruins – 'Castle in the Sky.notes: Entry ¥500. Hours seasonal: Mar–May 08:00–18:00, Jun–Aug 06:00–18:00 (sea-of-clouds dawn), Sep–Nov 04:00–17:00, Dec–early Jan 10:00–14:00; closed Jan 4–end Feb.

parking.name: Yamashiro-no-Sato lot
parking.notes: Shuttle bus + 20 min hike; no private cars on castle road

Takeda Castle Ruins – 'Castle in the Sky.getting_there: JR Takeda Station + 'Tenku' bus 20 min, or 40-min uphill hike from station.

teamLab Borderless (Azabudai Hills).notes: Weekday adult ¥3,600; weekend/holiday ¥3,800; peak dates ¥4,200. Separate venue from teamLab Planets Toyosu. Hours 09:00–21:00 (last entry 20:00). Timed reservation required.
teamLab Borderless (Azabudai Hills).getting_there: Kamiyacho (Hibiya) directly connected; Roppongi-itchome 4 min walk.

teamLab Planets TOKYO (Toyosu).notes: Hours: 09:00–22:00 (last entry 21:00). Weekend adult walk-up typically ¥3800 (weekdays ~¥3600); prices vary by date — reserve online. Includes Garden area.
teamLab Planets TOKYO (Toyosu).getting_there: Yurikamome Line to Shin-Toyosu Stn (1-min walk), or Tokyo Metro Yūrakuchō Line to Toyosu Stn (~10-min walk).

Tenryū-ji & Sōgen Pond Garden.notes: Garden ¥500; +¥300 buildings (Ōhōjō); +¥500 Cloud Dragon ceiling (weekends/special). Hours 08:30–17:00.
Tenryū-ji & Sōgen Pond Garden.getting_there: JR Saga-Arashiyama / Keifuku Arashiyama Station 5 min walk.

Teshima Art Museum.notes: Adult ¥1,570. Hours 10:00–17:00 (Mar–Oct), 10:00–16:00 (Nov–Feb). Closed Tue (Mar–Nov) / Tue–Thu (Dec–Feb). Reservation required.
Teshima Art Museum.getting_there: Ferry from Uno or Takamatsu to Ieura/Karato port, then bus or e-bike to museum.

Tokyo Skytree & Tembō Galleria.notes: Hours: 10:00–22:00 (last entry 21:00). Combo (Tembo Deck + Galleria) adult ¥3000 online; +¥500 at 4F counter. Tembo Deck only ¥1800. Prices may vary by date.

parking.name: Tokyo Skytree Town Parking
parking.notes: Under Tokyo Solamachi; discount with shopping receipts.

Tokyo Skytree & Tembō Galleria.getting_there: Tokyo Skytree Stn (Tōbu Skytree line) or Oshiage Stn (Asakusa/Hanzōmon/Keisei). ~15 min from Tokyo Stn via Hanzōmon line.

Tokyo Tower.notes: Main Deck (150m) ¥1,500; Main+Top Deck Tour combo ¥3,500. Hours 09:00–23:00 (last entry 22:30).
Tokyo Tower.getting_there: Akabanebashi (Oedo) 5 min; Kamiyacho (Hibiya) 7 min; Onarimon/Shibakoen (Mita) 6 min.

Tourbillon Castle.notes: Hilltop ruins free to walk; closed Nov–Mar.

Tre Cime di Lavaredo.notes: Toll road SP49 from Misurina ≈ €30/car ≈ CHF 28. May–October only.

parking.name: Parcheggio Rifugio Auronzo (2,320 m)
parking.notes: Pay toll at Misurina barrier on entry. Open end of May–October. Direct at trailhead; main Tre Cime circuit ~10 km / 3 h from here. Winter access on foot/snowshoe only.

entrance.name: Rifugio Auronzo trailhead (2,320 m)
entrance.transfer: Walk <1 min from parking to trailhead; main circuit ~10 km, 3 hr

Tre Cime di Lavaredo.getting_there: Drive from Misurina up toll road SP49; pay ~€30/car at the barrier; park at Rifugio Auronzo (2,320 m), the main trailhead. Open May–October only.

Trift Bridge (Triftbrücke).notes: Triftbahn cable car return; bridge itself is free after a 1.5-hr hike.

Tsukiji Outer Market (Tsukiji Jōgai Shij.notes: Public street market; free to wander. Most shops 05:00–14:00, peak 08:00–11:00. Many closed Sun/Wed.
Tsukiji Outer Market (Tsukiji Jōgai Shij.getting_there: Tsukijishijō (Oedo) or Tsukiji (Hibiya) Station, 1–3 min walk.

Tsurugaoka Hachimangū.notes: Shrine grounds free; Treasure Hall ¥200, Museum ¥1,000. Grounds open 06:00–21:00 (Apr–Sep), 06:30–21:00 (Oct–Mar).
Tsurugaoka Hachimangū.getting_there: JR/Enoden Kamakura Station 10 min walk up Wakamiya-ōji.

Tō-ji + Five-Storey Pagoda.notes: Kondō/Kōdō ¥500 standard; ¥800–1,000 during special openings (spring/autumn pagoda interior viewing). Hours 08:00–17:00.
Tō-ji + Five-Storey Pagoda.getting_there: Kintetsu Tōji Station 5 min; JR Kyoto Station 15 min walk southwest.

Tōdai-ji & the Great Buddha (Daibutsu).notes: Hours: Daibutsu-den 07:30–17:30 (Apr–Oct), 08:00–17:00 (Nov–Mar). Adult ¥800; Daibutsuden+Museum combo ¥1200. Hokke-dō & Kaidan-dō separate ¥800.

parking.name: Tōdai-ji Parking (Nara Park area)
parking.notes: Several park lots near Nandaimon; can be busy in autumn.

Tōdai-ji & the Great Buddha (Daibutsu).getting_there: From Kintetsu Nara Stn 20-min walk through Nara Park, or Nara Kōtsū bus to Daibutsuden-Kasuga-Taisha-mae (~5 min).

Tōfuku-ji + Tsūtenkyō Bridge.notes: Tsūtenkyō+Kaisandō ¥600; Hōjō gardens ¥500; combo ¥1,000. Hours 09:00–16:30 (autumn 08:30–16:30; Dec–Mar to 16:00).

parking.name: Tōfuku-ji parking
parking.notes: Closed during peak autumn foliage (mid-Nov–early Dec)

Tōfuku-ji + Tsūtenkyō Bridge.getting_there: JR Nara Line or Keihan Tōfukuji Station 10 min walk.

Ueno Park & Ueno Tōshō-gū.notes: Park free 05:00–23:00; Ueno Tōshō-gū shrine grounds free, Golden Hall ¥500 (09:00–16:30). Museums charge separately.
Ueno Park & Ueno Tōshō-gū.getting_there: JR Ueno Station (Park Exit) directly; Keisei Ueno also adjacent.

Uetliberg.notes: Zürich HB–Uetliberg train return; covered by ZVV day pass.

Vallée de Joux — Watchmaking Valley.notes: Valley access free; Espace Horloger CHF 12.

Vallée des Merveilles.notes: Trailhead access is free; the core engravings zone in Mercantour NP requires a licensed guide (groups capped at 15).

parking.name: Parking Lac des Mesches (trailhead, D91 Mesches, Tende)
parking.notes: Gravel trailhead parking at the end of D91 in Mesches hamlet (Tende, ~1,395 m). Seasonal (~June–October). Casterino (~1,540 m, narrower road) is a shorter alternative.

entrance.name: Refuge des Merveilles / Vallée des Merveilles engravings zone
entrance.transfer: ~3-hour hike, 9 km, +650 m elevation gain from Lac des Mesches

Vallée des Merveilles.getting_there: Drive D91 west of Tende to Lac des Mesches trailhead (free gravel lot, ~1,395 m); hike ~3 h / 9 km to Refuge des Merveilles. Guided tour mandatory in the core engravings zone.

Valère Basilica.notes: Basilica + History Museum combined; hilltop walk is free.

Verzasca Dam (Contra Dam).notes: Free public viewing; bungee jump from operator separate.

Villa del Balbianello.notes: FAI: Garden/Park only €15 (≈ CHF 14); Villa guided tour + Garden €25.

parking.name: Parcheggio Lido di Lenno / Tremezzina (lakefront)
parking.notes: Park in Tremezzina (formerly Lenno) near Lido di Lenno. Limited spaces — arrive early. NO public car access to the villa. Two routes: taxi boat from Lido di Lenno (~10 min, Bellagio Boat Service, fee) OR walk 1 km / ~25 min uphill from Lenno.

entrance.name: Villa del Balbianello (Dosso d'Avedo promontory, Lake Como)
entrance.transfer: Taxi boat from Lido di Lenno ~10 min OR walk 1 km uphill from Lenno (~25 min)

Villa del Balbianello.getting_there: Drive to Tremezzina (Lenno); park at Lido di Lenno (~50 spaces). Reach the villa by taxi boat (~10 min, fee) or walk 1 km uphill from Lenno (~25 min). FAI booking: villadelbalbianello.it.

Yamadera Risshaku-ji.notes: Hours: 08:00–17:00 (winter shorter, last entry 16:00). Adult ¥300, child ¥100. ~1000 stone steps to upper Okunoin; allow 60–90 min round trip.

parking.name: Yamadera private lots near JR Yamadera Stn
parking.notes: Multiple small private lots at trail base, walk over Tachiya bridge.

Yamadera Risshaku-ji.getting_there: JR Senzan Line to Yamadera Stn (~20 min from Yamagata), 7-min walk to base of stone staircase.

Yasaka Shrine + Gion district.notes: Shrine open 24h, free. Gion district free to walk; geisha-viewing etiquette enforced.
Yasaka Shrine + Gion district.getting_there: Keihan Gion-Shijō 5 min; Hankyū Kyoto-Kawaramachi 10 min; bus 206 to Gion stop.

Yonaha Maehama Beach.notes: Public beach, free access 24h; activities (marine sports, rentals) ¥1,000–8,000 from operators.
Yonaha Maehama Beach.getting_there: Rental car from Miyako Airport ~15 min via Route 246.

Yoshino-yama.notes: Hours: Mountain 24h public roads; shrines/temples ~08:30–17:00. Free to enter area. Yoshino Ropeway (Sembonguchi–Yoshinoyama, oldest in Japan) was suspended for safety; check status before relying on it. Cherry season Apr brings traffic controls.

parking.name: Shimosenbon Parking (吉野山観光駐車場)
parking.notes: Year-round paid since 2025-10. Traffic restrictions Mar 20–May 10; park & bus ride encouraged.

Yoshino-yama.getting_there: Kintetsu Yoshino Line to Yoshino Stn (terminal); cable car/shuttle bus up to Shimosenbon village (~5 min).

Yukino Ōtani Snow Corridor.notes: Snow Corridor itself is free to walk at Murodō, but reached only via Tateyama Kurobe Alpine Route: one-way Tateyama→Ōgizawa ¥9,800; round-trip to Murodō from Tateyama ¥7,380. Open mid-Apr to mid-Jun (snow walk season); route operates Apr 15–Nov 30.
Yukino Ōtani Snow Corridor.getting_there: Toyama Chihō Railway to Tateyama Station, then cablecar+bus to Murodō (~2h).

Zaō Onsen & Ropeway (Juhyō Snow Monsters.notes: Zaō Ropeway round-trip to Jizō Sancho (snow monster viewing) ¥3,800 winter; ¥3,500 green season. Hours 08:30–17:00; night cruise Dec–Feb.

parking.name: Zaō Onsen Ropeway
parking.notes: Chains/snow tires required

Zaō Onsen & Ropeway (Juhyō Snow Monsters.getting_there: JR Yamagata Station + bus 40 min to Zaō Onsen Bus Terminal.

Zermatt.notes: Car-free village free to enter; cable cars and Gornergrat extra.

parking.name: Obermoos Car Park – Tiroler Zugspitzbahn Valley Station (Ehrwald, 1,225 m)
parking.notes: Parking at Obermoos is at the AUSTRIAN-side cable-car valley station in Ehrwald, Tyrol. The German-side approach (Eibsee or Bavarian rack railway from Garmisch) is separate.

entrance.name: Zugspitze Summit – Tiroler Zugspitzbahn Top Station (2,950 m)
entrance.transfer: 10-min cable car from Obermoos/Ehrwald valley station (3.6 km, 100-person cabin)

Zugspitze.getting_there: Drive to Ehrwald (Obermoos) in Tyrol; park at the valley station; 10-min Austrian-side cable car to the summit (2,950 m). Distinct from German-side routes.

Zürich Old Town & Grossmünster.notes: Old town and Grossmünster church free; Karlsturm tower CHF 5.
